content.query:
IF OBJECT_ID('dbo.Package Advanced Find-order ——BI (spec-in)') IS NOT NULL DROP VIEW dbo.Package Advanced Find-order ——BI (spec-in)
GO

CREATE view [dbo].[Package Advanced Find-order ——BI (spec-in)]
as
SELECT
 opportunity.utc_packageid as 'Package ID',
 opportunity.utc_estbookingrevenue as 'Est. Booking Revenue',
 (select name from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.businessunit_partitioned where Id =systemuser.businessunitid) as 'Business Unit (Owning User) (User)',
 (select utc_name from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[utc_successrate_partitioned] where Id = opportunity.utc_packagesuccessrate) as 'Success Rate',
 opportunity.utc_activestage as 'Process Stage Name (Process Stage) (Process Stage)',
 systemuser.fullname as 'Owner',
 systemuser.nickname as 'Chinese Name (Owning User) (User)',
 systemuser.domainname as 'User Name (Owning User) (User)', 
 dateadd(HOUR,8,opportunity.utc_estbookingdate) as 'Est. Booking Date',
 dateadd(HOUR,8,opportunity.createdon) as 'Created On',
 dateadd(HOUR,8,opportunity.modifiedon) as 'Modified On',
 opportunity.actualclosedate as 'Actual Close Date', 
 dateadd(HOUR,8,opportunity.utc_estdeliverydate) as 'Est Delivery Date',
 convert(varchar,(select dateadd(HOUR,8,opportunity.utc_orderdate)),111) as 'Contract Effective Date',
 opportunity.name as 'Package Name',
 utc_quotation.utc_name as 'Final Quotation',
 CASE utc_project.utc_isquotecreated WHEN 'True' THEN 'Yes' ELSE 'No' END AS 'Is Quote Created (Project) (Project)',
 opportunity.utc_paackageproductamount as 'Paackage product amount', 
 (select LocalizedLabel from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.[StateMetadata] where LocalizedLabelLanguageCode ='1033' and EntityName = 'opportunity' and [StateMetadata].State = opportunity.statecode ) as 'Status',
 (select utc_chinesename from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].utc_lostpricerange_partitioned where id = opportunity.utc_lostprice ) as 'Lost Price' ,
 (select utc_chinesename from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[utc_lostreason_partitioned] where id = opportunity.utc_lostreason ) as 'Lost Reason',
 (select [name] from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].competitor_partitioned where id = opportunity.utc_lostto ) as 'Lost To',
 utc_quotation.utc_totalamountn as 'Total Amount (Final Quotation) (Quotation)',
 (
 select utc_name from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[utc_application_solution_partitioned] where id = opportunity.utc_applicationsolution
 ) as 'Application & Solution',
 convert(varchar,(select dateadd(HOUR,8,opportunity.utc_awarddate)),111) as 'Award Date',
 
 convert(varchar,(select dateadd(HOUR,8,opportunity.utc_biddate)),111) as 'Bid Date',
 (
 select utc_name from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[utc_bidstrategy_partitioned] where Id = opportunity.utc_bidstrategy ---未知
 )as 'Bid Strategy',
 (SELECT LocalizedLabel FROM dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[OptionSetMetadata] 
 WHERE EntityName like 'opportunity' and LocalizedLabelLanguageCode ='1033'
 and OptionSetName = 'utc_bidtype'
 and [Option] = opportunity.utc_bidtype
 ) as 'Bid Type',
 
 (select utc_name from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.[dbo].[utc_packagetype_partitioned] where id= opportunity.utc_packagetype) as 'Package Type',
 systemuser.employeeid as 'Employee ID (Owning User) (User)--',
 utc_project.utc_projectno as 'Project No (Project) (Project)', 
CASE opportunity.utc_specin WHEN 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS 'Spec In',
 (select name from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.account_partitioned where Id = opportunity.utc_packagedesigner)as 'Architect',
 (select name from dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.account_partitioned where Id = opportunity.utc_packageconsultant)as 'Consultant--', 
CASE opportunity.utc_engagedesigner WHEN 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS 'Engage Architect',
CASE opportunity.utc_engageconsultant WHEN 'True' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS 'Engage Consultant',
 opportunity.opportunityid,
 opportunity.utc_packagesuccessrate,
 opportunity.ownerid,
 opportunity.utc_packagefinalquotation,
 opportunity.utc_bidstrategy,
 opportunity.utc_applicationsolution,
 systemuser.businessunitid,
 opportunity.carcgl_supportstaff as 'Suppord Staff',
 opportunity.carcgl_scopeofbid as 'Bid Scope'
 
FROM
 dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.opportunity_partitioned opportunity
 LEFT JOIN
 dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.utc_quotation_partitioned utc_quotation
 ON utc_quotation.utc_quotationid = opportunity.utc_packagefinalquotation 
 LEFT JOIN
 dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.utc_successrate_partitioned utc_successrate
 ON utc_successrate.utc_successrateid = opportunity.utc_packagesuccessrate 
 LEFT JOIN
 dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.systemuser_partitioned systemuser
 ON systemuser.systemuserid = opportunity.owninguser 
 LEFT JOIN
 dataverse_carrierchina_caschinaprd.DBO.utc_project_partitioned utc_project
 ON utc_project.utc_projectid = opportunity.utc_project
WHERE ISNULL(opportunity.carcgl_applicationregion,'')<> 2 --2 for HK 
GO
